name: Bloomfire Knowledge Management API
what_it_does: Bloomfire REST API for knowledge management and social learning platform. Enables AI agents to create, search, and manage posts and Q&A content, sync user data, track engagement metrics, and integrate Bloomfire knowledge into CRM and support workflows. Bloomfire focuses on searchable, social knowledge sharing with Q&A capabilities.
use_cases: Creating knowledge posts from content discovery and capture agents
Searching institutional knowledge from AI assistant and support agents
Syncing user and group data from HR integration agents
Tracking content engagement and knowledge utilization from analytics agents
not_for: Structured database-style knowledge without social/Q&A needs
Customer-facing help centers (Bloomfire is primarily internal)
File storage without searchable knowledge management
best_when: A customer insights, research, or knowledge management team wants AI agents to capture, search, and surface institutional knowledge from Bloomfire's social knowledge base.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Internal knowledge base contains proprietary business information. API access may expose employee-generated content and Q&A discussions.

auth.notes: Bloomfire supports API key authentication and OAuth 2.0. API access requires enterprise plan. Keys are community-scoped.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise pricing per seat
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; API access included at enterprise tier
pricing.notes: Enterprise knowledge management pricing. API access typically requires enterprise engagement.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLAs available

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Proprietary internal knowledge and employee Q&A content
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API
Limited public API documentation — enterprise support engagement often needed
API access requires enterprise plan — not available on lower tiers
Social knowledge model (posts, Q&A, comments) differs from traditional wiki structure
agent_readiness.security_notes: Proprietary internal knowledge and Q&A. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API with limited public docs. US-only data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Internal knowledge and Q&A. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only. US-only data residency.
